headline.purpose: Modal and card headings; bold and tight, never poster-sized.

body.purpose: Prose and form labels in Plus Jakarta Sans.

label.purpose: Mono 10px uppercase 0.14em — section headers, pills, statuses.

shadows.name: node
shadows.purpose: Canvas nodes and cards floating over the dotted grid.

motion.name: bg-pulse
motion.purpose: Auth/waitlist glow: wandering translate + opacity breathe.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The voltage action — one per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; background: var(--accent, #ff5a19); color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:8px; padding:9px 12px; font: 500 13.5px/1.2 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition: background .15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-strong, #f04400); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #ff5a19); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Quiet secondary action on any dark surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; background: rgba(208,219,218,.05); color:#d0dbda; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15); border-radius:8px; padding:9px 12px; font: 500 13.5px/1.2 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition: background .15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(208,219,218,.1); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #ff5a19); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Wire-goes-live focus: border snaps to accent with a 1px ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width:100%; background: rgba(208,219,218,.05); color:#d0dbda; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15); border-radius:8px; padding:8px 10px; font: 400 13px/1.4 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; outline:none; transition: border-color .15s ease-out, box-shadow .15s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7776; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--accent, #ff5a19); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--accent, #ff5a19); }

components.name: Method Chip
components.description: Semaphore chip — hue is data (POST shown).
components.css: .ds-chip-post, .ds-chip-get { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; border-radius:6px; padding:2px 6px; font: 700 10px/1.4 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; letter-spacing:.05em; } .ds-chip-post { color:#ff5a19; background: rgba(255,90,25,.1); } .ds-chip-get { color:#14DB7F; background: rgba(20,219,127,.1); }

components.name: Nav Pill
components.description: Etched-label pill from the top bar (env / header-set pickers).
components.html: <button class="ds-nav-pill">Development <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 10 10"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m2 3.5 3 3 3-3"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-nav-pill { display:inline-flex; height:40px; align-items:center; gap:8px; border:none; border-radius:9999px; background: rgba(208,219,218,.06); color:#d0dbda; padding:0 14px; font: 600 10px/1 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; letter-spacing:.1em; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; transition: background .15s ease-out; } .ds-nav-pill:hover { background: rgba(208,219,218,.09); } .ds-nav-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #ff5a19); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Workflow Node
components.description: The signature component: request node with tinted title row, mono URL, status chip.
components.html:
Create Customer1
POST{{env.BASE_URL}}/api/customers
READY
components.css: .ds-node { width:280px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; border-radius:20px; padding:8px; background:#100f0f; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / .5), 0 8px 24px rgb(0 0 0 / .35); font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-node-title { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; border-radius:9999px; padding:4px 4px 4px 8px; color:#ff5a19; background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(255,90,25,.08), transparent); } .ds-node-name { font-size:15px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:-0.01em; } .ds-node-step { display:flex; width:20px; height:20px; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border-radius:9999px; border:1px solid #ff5a19; font: 500 10px/1 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; } .ds-node-field { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; height:36px; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); background: rgba(208,219,218,.03); padding:8px 12px; } .ds-node-method { color:#ff5a19; background:rgba(255,90,25,.1); border-radius:6px; padding:2px 6px; font: 700 10px/1.4 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; } .ds-node-url { color:#d0dbda; font: 400 12px/1 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; } .ds-node-status { display:inline-flex; width:fit-content; margin-left:4px; color:#ff5a19; background:rgba(255,90,25,.1); border-radius:6px; padding:2px 8px; font: 700 10px/1.6 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; letter-spacing:.08em; }

narrative.overview: A dark room, glass monitors, one orange signal cutting through. Orqly's surfaces are near-black and calm; information arrives as colored light — a green GET, an orange POST, a running edge pulsing across the canvas. The system is a professional instrument, not a toy: density is welcome, decoration is not, and nothing glows without meaning something. The premium feel comes from restraint executed precisely: machined controls, structural glass, one voltage line.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black canvas with a dotted grid; content floats on structural glass
One accent (Voltage Orange) for action and identity; all other color is data
Mono type marks everything machine-owned; Jakarta carries human prose
Motion is spent on one live thing at a time (a running edge, a breathing glow)

rules.name: The One Voltage Rule
rules.body: Voltage Orange is the only color allowed to mean 'Orqly'. Status hues belong to data and never moonlight as decoration; orange never encodes data.

rules.name: The Derived Gray Rule
rules.body: Every gray on screen is a color-mix of Steel Ink into Carbon Black. Independent hex grays are prohibited.

rules.name: The Mono Means Machine Rule
rules.body: URLs, methods, statuses, codes, counts and section labels are always JetBrains Mono. Human sentences are always Jakarta.

rules.name: The Blur-Is-Altitude Rule
rules.body: More blur = higher layer. A dropdown may never blur less than the panel beneath it.

dos: Do keep Voltage Orange ≤10% of any screen; its rarity is the voltage.
Do use mono + uppercase + 0.14em tracking for every section label and status.
Do encode meaning in the semaphore hues exactly as the canvas does (GET green, POST orange, PUT amber, PATCH blue, DELETE red).
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion and prefers-reduced-transparency for every new effect.
Do keep body text ≥4.5:1 against Carbon Black.
donts: Don't build the generic SaaS template: no cream heroes, no gradient text, no identical feature-card grids.
Don't drift toward enterprise-dashboard chrome: no blue-gray fills, no dense bordered tables as layout.
Don't do dev-terminal cosplay: no matrix green on black, no ASCII borders, no scanlines.
Don't introduce independent grays or a second accent.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders (>1px border-left) on cards or alerts.
Don't add glass decoratively — if a blur doesn't encode altitude, it doesn't ship.
